title: neltuma caldenia
intro: Neltuma caldenia, also known as Calendula officinalis, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in wound healing and anti-inflammatory applications. The health benefits of Neltuma caldenia include reducing skin irritation, soothing burns, and promoting wound healing due to its high antioxidant and antimicrobial content. Herbal preparations of Neltuma caldenia include teas, salves, and creams that can be used to treat various skin conditions and promote overall well-being.
